source_pr.title: store: fix data race in mock PD timeout error
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Shuaipeng Yu <jackysp@gmail.com>

<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix data race in mock for PD timeout error.

### What is changed and how it works?
Fix it.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: store: fix data race in mock PD timeout error.
